---
title: "create_incremental.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\create_incremental.py"
loc: 94
complexity: 5
logic_score: 3.23
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.38
---

## Intent
The `create_incremental.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on generate_cases. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via generate_cases. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [random](file://random)
- [sys](file://sys)

### Exports
- `generate_cases`
